---
title: "Quantitative Methods — coursebook"
description: "Forked CASA0007 Quantitative Methods coursebook; teaching notes and exercises."
author: "Adam Dennett"
date: "2025-11-24"
categories: [teaching, R, statistics, UCL]
image: featured.png
---

Forked from the upstream CASA0007 Quantitative Methods coursebook, kept up
to date with my own additions and edits.

- [Open the coursebook →](https://adamdennett.github.io/QM/)
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/adamdennett/QM)
